description_long: This is a small wooden train station platform with a gabled roof covered in reddish-brown shingles. The structure features a covered waiting area supported by wooden posts, a main enclosed room with windows and doors, and an open deck area with steps leading up to the platform. Adjacent to the platform is a short section of railway track, along with a couple of simple wooden signposts. The platform is elevated above the ground and constructed primarily from light-colored wood planks, giving it a rustic, old-fashioned appearance. The overall design suggests a rural or small-town setting, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on functional, sturdy construction.
description: A rustic wooden train station platform with a gabled roof, open deck, and adjacent railway track. The structure features a covered waiting area, steps, and simple signposts.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the gabled roof, main entrance, steps, and adjacent railway track with signposts.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the platform, the covered waiting area, and the railway track ending at the platform.
description_view_2: Rear angled view showing the back of the platform, the roof structure, and the full length of the railway track.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the windows, doors, and the full stretch of the railway track parallel to the platform.
attribute_structural_features: Gabled roof, wooden posts, open deck, steps, windows, doors, adjacent railway track, signposts
